sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n72999" key="o)ligobarh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀλῐγο-βᾰρής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n72999.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">light in weight,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:3:76" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Aeg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.76</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
